Resolved via option (c): kept auto-spawn-of-24-tributes design, rewrote 9 ignored tests in api/tests/tributes_tests.rs to operate on the auto-spawned roster (fetch via GET, then exercise GET/PUT/DELETE/log/items, plus new coverage for spawn count + district coverage). Implemented in PR #204: 3 new typed MessagePayload variants (CycleStart, CycleEnd, GameEnded) replace the AreaEvent fallback. Cycle announcements + winner emission now construct typed payloads directly. New CycleCard renders them; MovementCard workaround removed."
Replaced GameEvent::Combat string fields with typed Box<CombatBeat> payload. Web format_game_event + tests updated.

Expanded combat_beat parity snapshots from 22 to 30: covered Pristine wear branch, both-worn, stress-fallback (no `stressed`), Critical+break+stress, BlockWound+shield-break+stress, AttackerDied+stress, FumbleDeath+wear, SelfAttackWound+wear. Locks baseline before mechanics rework (93m).

Added enemy_density HashMap<Area,u32> to EnvironmentContext + Brain::act + Brain::choose_destination. Per-area crowd penalty (8 per enemy, capped at 32, excluding self) replaces the call-site `crowded && best_goal == tribute.area` workaround in Brain::act smart-path arm. Two new unit tests cover dispersion + self-exclusion.

GamePeriodPage route now carries `?filter=&tribute=` query params. URL → context: on first render of the page, non-empty query values overwrite gloo-storage state so shared links land on the exact slice. Context → URL: a use_effect compares the current PeriodFilters serialization to the URL params and calls navigator.replace when they diverge, so chip clicks update the URL. FilterMode gains to_query_value/from_query_value (stable slug encoding, State+CombatSwing skipped, unknown slugs collapse to All). Period card link updated. 4 new unit tests. just quality clean.
